visual-anti-patterns.notes: One anti-pattern: feature card descriptions on landing and builder labels appear smaller than 16px

visual-child-friendly.notes: Large tappable object buttons with emoji icons, minimal text density, playful tone; slight deduction for text-only theme selector buttons that could be more pictorial for young children

visual-consistency.notes: Consistent purple accent, rounded corners, sans-serif type ramp, and light backgrounds across all pages; minor drift between gallery card gradient previews and landing page flat white cards

visual-accessibility.notes: Good dark-on-light contrast and text labels on most buttons; no visible keyboard focus rings, AI send button is icon-only without label, some placeholder text is low contrast
